special_mechanics.name: Side-scrolling movement with combat stance
special_mechanics.description: Hero walks and runs left to right through linear fortress, entering fighting stance for one-on-one combat encounters

special_mechanics.name: Environmental hazards
special_mechanics.description: Fatal cliffside drops and falling portcullis obstacles present throughout levels

special_mechanics.name: Health regeneration
special_mechanics.description: Both player and enemy health bars slowly regenerate if avoiding hits for sufficient duration

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative only. Source is Wikipedia gameplay description with no specific physics parameters documented. Game emphasizes cinematic storytelling and rotoscoped animation over precise movement mechanics. NES port (1987) specific movement data not available in source material.
